ops.body: 2026-07-16: the "eval-v3 freeze" item in this task is dropped — the prereg apparatus was scrapped under the clean-slate directive (see EXP eval-v3 log + cancelled c2349fe); the eval frame is being rebuilt wholesale from the clean dataset (plan Part 0/T1). The staged go-live progression (shadow→mirror→live_allow→live_all, human-gated) and the E12/E13 stage reads remain, but any reads comparing against the old eval-v2 frame need re-grounding on the clean frame — the 22 empty-context flooring rows that inflated v001's coverage lead are gone.
